title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Marks & Spencer India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Marks & Spencer India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
